results.title: EPC targets high-density motion systems with GaN ePower Stage technology
results.description: Efficient Power Conversion Corp (EPC) of El Segundo, CA, USA — which makes enhancement-mode gallium nitride on silicon (eGaN) power field-effect transistors (FETs) and integrated circuits for power management applications — has introduced the EPC91128, EPC91129, EPC91130 and EPC91131 evaluation boards — compact, high-performance 3-phase brushless DC (BLDC) motor drive inverter platforms designed to accelerate development of next-generation motor control systems using GaN technology...
